diagrams.title: Cache Controller Architecture
diagrams.description: Shows how cache controller sits between CPU and main memory, with cache memory, tag directory, and control logic
diagrams.purpose: Understanding the placement and data flow in cache system

diagrams.title: Cache Hit vs Miss Flowchart
diagrams.description: Decision diagram showing the steps when CPU requests data - checking valid bit and tag match
diagrams.purpose: Visualizing the decision process for cache operations

diagrams.title: Address Division in Cache
diagrams.description: Shows how memory address is divided into Tag, Index, and Offset fields for cache lookup
diagrams.purpose: Understanding how addresses map to cache locations

diagrams.title: Write-Through vs Write-Back
diagrams.description: Comparison diagram showing data flow for both write policies
diagrams.purpose: Understanding different write policies and their data flow
